title: Separate translucent Topology zones
description: Render zone backgrounds translucently and guarantee that sibling zone regions do not overlap in the Topology view.
decision_notes: Zone backgrounds use the existing zone palette at 30 percent alpha.
Topology preserves computed area geometry instead of applying Overview's visual outset.
A candidate that would overlap another sibling zone is rejected; the grid expands when needed.
Node and connector colors remain opaque so translucent containment does not reduce legibility.
verification: Browser: golden-topology has 6 translucent zones and 0 overlapping zone pairs
